title: [2주차 마무리] 뼈대와 수식어 완벽 분리 실전 훈련 (100문제)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 수식어를 괄호로 묶고, 뼈대를 분석한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: The sun shines brightly in the clear sky.

answer.analysis: The sun(S) shines(V) (brightly) (in the clear sky).
answer.translation: 맑은 하늘에서 해가 밝게 빛난다.

problems.stem: The girl with long hair is my younger sister.

answer.analysis: The girl(S) (with long hair) is(V) my younger sister(C).
answer.translation: 긴 머리의 저 소녀는 나의 여동생이다.

problems.stem: I usually drink a cup of coffee in the morning.

answer.analysis: I(S) (usually) drink(V) a cup(O) (of coffee) (in the morning).
answer.translation: 나는 보통 아침에 커피 한 잔을 마신다.

problems.stem: My parents gave me a wonderful gift for my birthday.

answer.analysis: My parents(S) gave(V) me(IO) a wonderful gift(DO) (for my birthday).
answer.translation: 부모님께서 내 생일 선물로 멋진 선물을 주셨다.

problems.stem: The teacher found the student's answer completely wrong.

answer.analysis: The teacher(S) found(V) the student's answer(O) (completely) wrong(OC).
answer.translation: 선생님은 그 학생의 답이 완전히 틀 렸다는 것을 알게 되었다.

problems.stem: The train for Busan departs from this platform at 10 a.m.

answer.analysis: The train(S) (for Busan) departs(V) (from this platform) (at 10 a.m.).
answer.translation: 부산행 기차는 오전 10시에 이 플랫폼에서 출발한다.

problems.stem: This old book on the shelf looks very interesting.

answer.analysis: This old book(S) (on the shelf) looks(V) (very) interesting(C).
answer.translation: 선반 위의 이 낡은 책은 매우 흥미로워 보인다.

problems.stem: She bought a beautiful dress at the new department store.

answer.analysis: She(S) bought(V) a beautiful dress(O) (at the new department store).
answer.translation: 그녀는 새로 생긴 백화점에서 아름다운 드레스를 샀다.

problems.stem: The sudden noise from outside made the baby cry.

answer.analysis: The sudden noise(S) (from outside) made(V) the baby(O) cry(OC).
answer.translation: 밖에서 나는 갑작스러운 소음이 아기를 울게 만들었다.

problems.stem: The chef cooked a delicious meal for the special guests.

answer.analysis: The chef(S) cooked(V) a delicious meal(O) (for the special guests).
answer.translation: 요리사는 특별한 손님들을 위해 맛있는 식 사를 요리했다.

problems.stem: The birds in the cage sing sweetly every morning.

answer.analysis: The birds(S) (in the cage) sing(V) (sweetly) (every morning).
answer.translation: 새장 안의 새들은 매일 아침 감미롭게 노래한다.

problems.stem: The new employee in our team seems very diligent.

answer.analysis: The new employee(S) (in our team) seems(V) (very) diligent(C).
answer.translation: 우리 팀의 신입사원은 매우 성실해 보인다.

problems.stem: I finally finished the difficult project after many weeks.

answer.analysis: I(S) (finally) finished(V) the difficult project(O) (after many weeks).
answer.translation: 나는 몇 주 후에 마침내 그 어려운 프로젝 트를 끝냈다.

problems.stem: He showed me his collection of old stamps with pride.

answer.analysis: He(S) showed(V) his collection(O) (of old stamps) (with pride).
answer.translation: 그는 자신의 오래된 우표 수집품을 자랑스럽게 보여주었다.

problems.stem: The long and boring speech made everyone sleepy.

answer.analysis: The long and boring speech(S) made(V) everyone(O) sleepy(OC).
answer.translation: 길고 지루한 연설은 모두를 졸리게 만들었

problems.stem: The cat under the table is watching a mouse carefully.

answer.analysis: The cat(S) (under the table) is watching(V) a mouse(O) (carefully).
answer.translation: 테이블 아래의 고양이가 쥐를 조심스럽게 지켜보고 있다.

problems.stem: The air in the countryside feels much fresher than in the city.

answer.analysis: The air(S) (in the countryside) feels(V) (much) fresher(C) (than in the city).
answer.translation: 시골의 공기는 도시보다 훨씬 더 신선하게 느껴진다.

problems.stem: She sent an email to her professor about her absence.

answer.analysis: She(S) sent(V) an email(O) (to her professor) (about her absence).
answer.translation: 그녀는 자신의 결석에 대해 교수님께 이메 일을 보냈다.

problems.stem: My father always tells me interesting stories about his youth.

answer.analysis: My father(S) (always) tells(V) me(IO) interesting stories(DO) (about his youth).
answer.translation: 아버지는 항상 나에게 자신의 젊은 시절에 대한 재미있는 이야기를 들려주신다.

problems.stem: We consider him the best candidate for this position.

answer.analysis: We(S) consider(V) him(O) the best candidate(OC) (for this position).
answer.translation: 우리는 그를 이 직책에 가장 적합한 후보 자로 여긴다.

problems.stem: The children played happily in the snow all day.

answer.analysis: The children(S) played(V) (happily) (in the snow) (all day).
answer.translation: 아이들은 하루 종일 눈 속에서 행복하게 놀았다.

problems.stem: The soup in this bowl tastes a little too salty for me.

answer.analysis: The soup(S) (in this bowl) tastes(V) (a little too) salty(C) (for me).
answer.translation: 이 그릇에 담긴 수프는 내게는 약간 너무 짠 맛이 난다.

problems.stem: I accidentally deleted an important file from my computer.

answer.analysis: I(S) (accidentally) deleted(V) an important file(O) (from my computer).
answer.translation: 나는 실수로 내 컴퓨터에서 중요한 파 일을 삭제했다.

problems.stem: Could you please bring me a glass of water from the kitchen?

answer.analysis: you(S) Could (please) bring(V) me(IO) a glass of water(DO) (from the kitchen)?
answer.translation: 부엌에서 물 한 잔만 가져다 주시겠어요?

problems.stem: The news of his success made his family very proud.

answer.analysis: The news(S) (of his success) made(V) his family(O) (very) proud(OC).
answer.translation: 그의 성공 소식은 그의 가족을 매우 자랑 스럽게 만들었다.

problems.stem: The river flows slowly through the peaceful valley.

answer.analysis: The river(S) flows(V) (slowly) (through the peaceful valley).
answer.translation: 강은 평화로운 계곡을 통해 천천히 흐른다.

problems.stem: The man in the black suit looks like a detective from a movie.

answer.analysis: The man(S) (in the black suit) looks(V) like a detective(C) (from a movie).
answer.translation: 검은 정장을 입은 남자는 영화에 나 오는 탐정처럼 보인다.

problems.stem: We discussed the problem for hours without any conclusion.

answer.analysis: We(S) discussed(V) the problem(O) (for hours) (without any conclusion).
answer.translation: 우리는 아무런 결론 없이 몇 시간 동 안 그 문제에 대해 논의했다.

problems.stem: The company will offer all employees a special bonus this year.

answer.analysis: The company(S) will offer(V) all employees(IO) a special bonus(DO) (this year).
answer.translation: 그 회사는 올해 모든 직원에 게 특별 보너스를 제공할 것이다.

problems.stem: The hot weather makes me feel tired and lethargic.

answer.analysis: The hot weather(S) makes(V) me(O) feel tired and lethargic(OC).
answer.translation: 더운 날씨는 나를 피곤하고 무기력하게 느끼 게 만든다.

problems.stem: The stars shine like diamonds in the dark night sky.

answer.analysis: The stars(S) shine(V) (like diamonds) (in the dark night sky).
answer.translation: 별들은 어두운 밤하늘에서 다이아몬드처럼 빛난

problems.stem: The situation in the country remains quite unstable.

answer.analysis: The situation(S) (in the country) remains(V) (quite) unstable(C).
answer.translation: 그 나라의 상황은 꽤 불안정한 상태로 남아있

problems.stem: I clearly remember the promise between you and me.

answer.analysis: I(S) (clearly) remember(V) the promise(O) (between you and me).
answer.translation: 나는 너와 나 사이의 약속을 분명히 기억한

problems.stem: She bought a new smartphone for her son on his birthday.

answer.analysis: She(S) bought(V) a new smartphone(O) (for her son) (on his birthday).
answer.translation: 그녀는 아들의 생일에 그를 위해 새 스 마트폰을 사주었다.

problems.stem: I found the last chapter of the book particularly moving.

answer.analysis: I(S) found(V) the last chapter(O) (of the book) (particularly) moving(OC).
answer.translation: 나는 그 책의 마지막 장이 특히 감동 적이라는 것을 알게 되었다.

problems.stem: Many people gathered in the square for the festival.

answer.analysis: Many people(S) gathered(V) (in the square) (for the festival).
answer.translation: 많은 사람들이 축제를 위해 광장에 모였다.

problems.stem: The new policy seems quite effective in many ways.

answer.analysis: The new policy(S) seems(V) (quite) effective(C) (in many ways).
answer.translation: 새 정책은 여러 면에서 꽤 효과적인 것 같다.

problems.stem: He is currently working on a new project with his colleagues.

answer.analysis: He(S) is (currently) working on(V) a new project(O) (with his colleagues).
answer.translation: 그는 현재 동료들과 함께 새로운 프 로젝트를 진행하고 있다.

problems.stem: The old woman gave the hungry child a piece of bread.

answer.analysis: The old woman(S) gave(V) the hungry child(IO) a piece of bread(DO).
answer.translation: 그 노부인은 배고픈 아이에게 빵 한 조 각을 주었다.

problems.stem: The citizens elected a new mayor for their city.

answer.analysis: The citizens(S) elected(V) a new mayor(O) (for their city).
answer.translation: 시민들은 자신들의 도시를 위해 새로운 시장을 선출

problems.stem: The leaves of the tree turn red and yellow in autumn.

answer.analysis: The leaves(S) (of the tree) turn(V) red and yellow(C) (in autumn).
answer.translation: 가을에는 나뭇잎들이 빨갛고 노랗게 변한다.

problems.stem: The music from the cafe sounds very relaxing.

answer.analysis: The music(S) (from the cafe) sounds(V) (very) relaxing(C).
answer.translation: 카페에서 흘러나오는 음악은 매우 편안하게 들린다.

problems.stem: The company provides its employees with various welfare benefits.

answer.analysis: The company(S) provides(V) its employees(O) (with various welfare benefits).
answer.translation: 그 회사는 직원들에게 다양한 복리후생을 제공한다.

problems.stem: The coach's advice helped the team win the game.

answer.analysis: The coach's advice(S) helped(V) the team(O) win the game(OC).
answer.translation: 코치의 조언은 팀이 경기에서 이기도록 도왔

problems.stem: He explained the complex theory to his students with simple examples.

answer.analysis: He(S) explained(V) the complex theory(O) (to his students) (with simple examples).
answer.translation: 그는 복잡한 이론을 학 생들에게 간단한 예시로 설명했다.

problems.stem: The baby in the cradle slept peacefully through the storm.

answer.analysis: The baby(S) (in the cradle) slept(V) (peacefully) (through the storm).
answer.translation: 요람 속의 아기는 폭풍우 속에서도 평화 롭게 잠을 잤다.

problems.stem: The defendant remained silent throughout the entire investigation.

answer.analysis: The defendant(S) remained(V) silent(C) (throughout the entire investigation).
answer.translation: 피고인은 전체 조사 과정 내내 침묵을 지켰다.

problems.stem: The marketing team launched a new campaign for their product.

answer.analysis: The marketing team(S) launched(V) a new campaign(O) (for their product).
answer.translation: 마케팅팀은 그들의 제품을 위한 새로운 캠페인을 시작했다.

problems.stem: The teacher asked her students a few questions about the last class.

answer.analysis: The teacher(S) asked(V) her students(IO) a few questions(DO) (about the last class).
answer.translation: 선생님은 학생들에게 지난 수업에 대해 몇 가지 질문을 했다.

problems.stem: The constant noise from the construction site is driving me mad.

answer.analysis: The constant noise(S) (from the construction site) is driving(V) me(O) mad(OC).
answer.translation: 공사 현장의 끊임없는 소음 이 나를 미치게 하고 있다.

problems.stem: The small boat drifted aimlessly on the vast ocean.

answer.analysis: The small boat(S) drifted(V) (aimlessly) (on the vast ocean).
answer.translation: 작은 배는 광활한 바다 위를 목적 없이 떠다녔다.

problems.stem: The price of oil went up sharply last month.

answer.analysis: The price(S) (of oil) went up(V) (sharply) (last month).
answer.translation: 지난달 유가가 급격히 상승했다.

problems.stem: I saw a group of dolphins in the distance during the boat trip.

answer.analysis: I(S) saw(V) a group of dolphins(O) (in the distance) (during the boat trip).
answer.translation: 나는 보트 여행 중에 멀리서 돌고래 떼를 보았다.

problems.stem: He promised his family a vacation.

answer.analysis: He(S) promised(V) his family(IO) a vacation(DO).
answer.translation: 그는 가족에게 휴가를 약속했다.

problems.stem: The new security system will keep our home safe from intruders.

answer.analysis: The new security system(S) will keep(V) our home(O) safe(OC) (from intruders).
answer.translation: 새로운 보안 시스템은 침입 자들로부터 우리 집을 안전하게 지켜줄 것이다.

problems.stem: The famous artist lived in a small village in France.

answer.analysis: The famous artist(S) lived(V) (in a small village) (in France).
answer.translation: 그 유명한 예술가는 프랑스의 작은 마을에 살았다.

problems.stem: Her dream finally came true.

answer.analysis: Her dream(S) finally came(V) true(C).
answer.translation: 그녀의 꿈은 마침내 실현되었다.

problems.stem: She accidentally broke her favorite cup this morning.

answer.analysis: She(S) (accidentally) broke(V) her favorite cup(O) (this morning).
answer.translation: 그녀는 오늘 아침에 실수로 가장 아끼는 컵을

problems.stem: I sincerely wish you success in your future endeavors.

answer.analysis: I(S) (sincerely) wish(V) you(IO) success(DO) (in your future endeavors).
answer.translation: 나는 당신의 미래의 노력에 성공이 있 기를 진심으로 기원합니다.

problems.stem: The difficult experience made him a more mature person.

answer.analysis: The difficult experience(S) made(V) him(O) a more mature person(OC).
answer.translation: 그 힘든 경험은 그를 더 성숙한 사람 으로 만들었다.

problems.stem: The next flight to London will depart in about an hour.

answer.analysis: The next flight(S) (to London) will depart(V) (in about an hour).
answer.translation: 다음 런던행 비행기는 약 한 시간 후에 출발할 것이다.

problems.stem: The sky over the city grew dark with storm clouds.

answer.analysis: The sky(S) (over the city) grew(V) dark(C) (with storm clouds).
answer.translation: 도시 위 하늘이 폭풍 구름으로 어두워졌다.

problems.stem: I deeply respect his dedication to his work.

answer.analysis: I(S) (deeply) respect(V) his dedication(O) (to his work).
answer.translation: 나는 그의 일에 대한 헌신을 깊이 존경한다.

problems.stem: The kind host cooked all the guests a wonderful dinner.

answer.analysis: The kind host(S) cooked(V) a wonderful dinner(O) (for all the guests).
answer.translation: 친절한 주인은 모든 손님을 위해 멋진 저녁을 요리했다.

problems.stem: The students in my class found the history lecture extremely boring.

answer.analysis: The students(S) (in my class) found(V) the history lecture(O) (extremely) boring(OC).
answer.translation: 우리 반 학생들은 역사 강의가 극도로 지루하다고 생각했다.

problems.stem: The stream flows gently down the mountain.

answer.analysis: The stream(S) flows(V) (gently) (down the mountain).
answer.translation: 시냇물은 산 아래로 부드럽게 흐른다.

problems.stem: The new evidence from the scene proved him innocent.

answer.analysis: The new evidence(S) (from the scene) proved(V) him(O) innocent(OC).
answer.translation: 현장에서 나온 새로운 증거는 그가 무 죄임을 증명했다.

problems.stem: She is actively looking for a new opportunity in another country.

answer.analysis: She(S) is (actively) looking for(V) a new opportunity(O) (in another country).
answer.translation: 그녀는 다른 나라에서 새로운 기회를 적극적으로 찾고 있다.

problems.stem: Can you do me a huge favor for a moment?

answer.analysis: you(S) Can do(V) me(IO) a huge favor(DO) (for a moment)?
answer.translation: 잠시 제 큰 부탁 하나만 들어주시겠어요?

problems.stem: He painted the walls of his room a bright yellow.

answer.analysis: He(S) painted(V) the walls(O) (of his room) a bright yellow(OC).
answer.translation: 그는 자기 방의 벽을 밝은 노란색으로 칠했다.

problems.stem: The number of tourists in this city is rapidly increasing every year.

answer.analysis: The number(S) (of tourists) (in this city) is (rapidly) increasing(V) (every year).
answer.translation: 이 도시의 관광객 수가 매년 급격히 증가하고 있다.

problems.stem: The milk in the carton has unfortunately gone bad.

answer.analysis: The milk (in the carton)(S) has (unfortunately) gone(V) bad(C).
answer.translation: 곽 안의 우유가 불행히도 상했다.

problems.stem: He solved the difficult math problem with little effort.

answer.analysis: He(S) solved(V) the difficult math problem(O) (with little effort).
answer.translation: 그는 거의 노력 없이 그 어려운 수학 문제를 풀었다.

problems.stem: The school provides every student with a free lunch.

answer.analysis: The school(S) provides(V) every student(O) (with a free lunch).
answer.translation: 그 학교는 모든 학생에게 무료 점심을 제공한

problems.stem: I always thought him a very honest and reliable person.

answer.analysis: I(S) (always) thought(V) him(O) a very honest and reliable person(OC).
answer.translation: 나는 항상 그가 매우 정직하고 믿을 수 있는 사람이라고 생각했다.

problems.stem: The cat is sleeping peacefully on the sofa in the living room.

answer.analysis: The cat(S) is sleeping(V) (peacefully) (on the sofa) (in the living room).
answer.translation: 개가 거실 소파 위에서 평화롭게 잠자 고 있다.

problems.stem: The air in the forest feels cool and fresh in the early morning.

answer.analysis: The air(S) (in the forest) feels(V) cool and fresh(C) (in the early morning).
answer.translation: 이른 아침 숲속의 공기는 시원하고 신선하게 느껴진다.

problems.stem: The author wrote a personal letter to each of his fans.

answer.analysis: The author(S) wrote(V) a personal letter(DO) (to each of his fans).
answer.translation: 그 작가는 자신의 각 팬에게 개인적인 편지 를 썼다.

problems.stem: The board of directors appointed her the new CEO of the company.

answer.analysis: The board of directors(S) appointed(V) her(O) the new CEO(OC) (of the company).
answer.translation: 이사회는 그녀를 그 회사 의 새로운 CEO로 임명했다.

problems.stem: I suddenly heard a loud crash from the kitchen.

answer.analysis: I(S) (suddenly) heard(V) a loud crash(O) (from the kitchen).
answer.translation: 나는 갑자기 부엌에서 나는 큰 충돌 소리를 들었다.

problems.stem: The concert on the beach will go on despite the rain.

answer.analysis: The concert(S) (on the beach) will go on(V) (despite the rain).
answer.translation: 비에도 불구하고 해변에서의 콘서트는 계속될 것

problems.stem: The new plan for the city's development seems quite promising.

answer.analysis: The new plan(S) (for the city's development) seems(V) (quite) promising(C).
answer.translation: 도시 개발을 위한 새로운 계획 은 꽤 유망해 보인다.

problems.stem: The government recently built a new library for the community.

answer.analysis: The government(S) (recently) built(V) a new library(O) (for the community).
answer.translation: 정부는 최근에 지역 사회를 위해 새로운 도서관을 지었다.

problems.stem: My grandfather often showed me his old pictures from the war.

answer.analysis: My grandfather(S) (often) showed(V) me(IO) his old pictures(DO) (from the war).
answer.translation: 할아버지는 종종 나에게 전 쟁 때의 낡은 사진들을 보여주셨다.

problems.stem: The long hike up the mountain made our legs very tired.

answer.analysis: The long hike(S) (up the mountain) made(V) our legs(O) (very) tired(OC).
answer.translation: 산 위로의 긴 하이킹은 우리 다리를 매우 피곤하게 만들었다.

problems.stem: The moon appeared brightly from behind the clouds.

answer.analysis: The moon(S) appeared(V) (brightly) (from behind the clouds).
answer.translation: 달이 구름 뒤에서 밝게 나타났다.

problems.stem: The new medicine from the lab tastes terribly bitter.

answer.analysis: The new medicine(S) (from the lab) tastes(V) (terribly) bitter(C).
answer.translation: 연구실에서 나온 신약은 끔찍하게 쓴맛이 난

problems.stem: I will definitely get you a good seat for the concert.

answer.analysis: I(S) will (definitely) get(V) you(IO) a good seat(DO) (for the concert).
answer.translation: 나는 반드시 너에게 콘서트 좋은 자리를 구해줄게.

problems.stem: The famous actor always keeps himself in good shape.

answer.analysis: The famous actor(S) (always) keeps(V) himself(O) in good shape(OC).
answer.translation: 그 유명한 배우는 항상 자신을 좋은 몸 상태로 유지한다.

problems.stem: The teacher gave her students a lot of homework over the weekend.

answer.analysis: The teacher(S) gave(V) her students(IO) a lot of homework(DO) (over the weekend).
answer.translation: 선생님은 주말 동안 학 생들에게 많은 숙제를 내주셨다.

problems.stem: The guests for the party arrived one after another.

answer.analysis: The guests(S) (for the party) arrived(V) (one after another).
answer.translation: 파티 손님들이 잇달아 도착했다.

problems.stem: He remained a true friend to me through all the difficult times.

answer.analysis: He(S) remained(V) a true friend(C) (to me) (through all the difficult times).
answer.translation: 그는 모든 어려운 시기를 거쳐 나 에게 진정한 친구로 남아주었다.

problems.stem: The unexpected storm damaged many crops in the region.

answer.analysis: The unexpected storm(S) damaged(V) many crops(O) (in the region).
answer.translation: 예기치 못한 폭풍이 그 지역의 많은 농 작물에 피해를 입혔다.

problems.stem: I want to ask you a personal question about your decision.

answer.analysis: I(S) want to ask(V) you(IO) a personal question(DO) (about your decision).
answer.translation: 나는 당신의 결정에 대해 개인적 인 질문을 하나 하고 싶습니다.

problems.stem: We believe the witness's testimony to be completely true.

answer.analysis: We(S) believe(V) the witness's testimony(O) to be accurate(OC).
answer.translation: 우리는 그 증인의 증언이 정확하다고 믿는다.

problems.stem: The dog on the leash is barking loudly at every passerby.

answer.analysis: The dog(S) (on the leash) is barking(V) (loudly) (at every passerby).
answer.translation: 목줄을 한 개가 모든 행인에게 시끄럽게 짖고 있다.

problems.stem: The room became completely silent after his shocking announcement.

answer.analysis: The room(S) became(V) (completely) silent(C) (after his shocking announcement).
answer.translation: 그의 충격적인 발표 후에 방은 완전히 조용해졌다.

problems.stem: He is currently learning Chinese for his new job in Shanghai.

answer.analysis: He(S) is (currently) learning(V) Chinese(O) (for his new job) (in Shanghai).
answer.translation: 그는 상하이에서의 새 직장을 위해 현재 중국어를 배우고 있다.

problems.stem: The tragic news in the paper left everyone speechless.

answer.analysis: The bad news(S) (in the paper) left(V) her(O) speechless(OC).
answer.translation: 신문에 실린 비극적인 소식은 그녀를 말문이 막 히게 했다.

problems.stem: The key to success in life is consistent effort.

answer.analysis: The key(S) (to success) (in life) is(V) consistent effort(C).
answer.translation: 인생에서 성공의 열쇠는 꾸준한 노력이다.
